mxCell.value: USER_STATUS: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
ADMIN_STARTED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

PROCESS_STATUS_IS_FINAL: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
